title: Jennifer Hale
content:
{{Top|rwp}} {{Citation}} {{Person |image=[[File:JenniferHale.jpg]] |name=Jennifer Hale |birth=[[January 1]],{{Twitter|jhaletweets|status/1487935188554248195|Jennifer Hale|quote=thanks!
(it's actually 1/1, but I'll happily receive the good wishes 🤓🙏🏼)|archivedate=20220130235119}}It's uncertain if Jennifer Hale was born in [[1972]], as reported by [[Wikipedia:The New Yorker|''The New Yorker'']] ({{WebCite|url=https://www.newyorker.com/magazine/2011/08/15/voicebox-360|text=Voicebox 360|author=Bissel, Tom|date=2011-08-08|work=[[Wikipedia:The New Yorker|''The New Yorker'']]|archivedate=20140724181133}}), as it conflicts with a publication from [[Wikipedia:Alabama School of Fine Arts|Alabama School of Fine Arts]] saying she graduated in [[1982]] ({{BookCite|container=Alumni News—Jennifer Hale—Theatre Arts –1982|title=Applause|number=Vol. 27, issue 6|date=April 2015|link=https://web.archive.org/web/20150720150343/https://www.asfa.k12.al.us/pdf/Applause/April%202015.pdf}})
[[Wikipedia:Happy Valley-Goose Bay|Goose Bay]], [[Wikipedia:Newfoundland and Labrador|Newfoundland and Labrador]], [[Wikipedia:Canada|Canada]]{{WebCite|url=http://www.disneychannelmedianet.com/web/showpage/showpage.aspx?program_id=3112592&type=hale|text=Jennifer Hale|work=Disney Channel Medianet|archivedate=20141229221657}} |death= |listedpronouns= |nationality=[[Wikipedia:Canada|Canadian]]–[[Wikipedia:United States|American]]{{WebCite|url=https://www.newyorker.com/magazine/2011/08/15/voicebox-360|text=Voicebox 360|author=Bissel, Tom|date=2011-08-08|work=[[Wikipedia:The New Yorker|''The New Yorker'']]|archivedate=20140724181133}} |occupation=Actress, voice actress |companies= |website=[https://jenniferhale.com jenniferhale.com] }} '''Jennifer Hale''' (born [[January 1]] in [[Wikipedia:Happy Valley-Goose Bay|Goose Bay]], [[Wikipedia:Labrador|Labrador]]) is a prolific [[Wikipedia:Canada|Canadian]] voice actress, notable for providing the voice of [[Bastila Shan]] in ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'', and ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', her descendant [[Satele Shan]], along with the female [[Meteor (Havoc Squad)|Trooper]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'', and the female [[Jaden Korr]] in ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''. She also voiced [[Aayla Secura]], [[Riyo Chuchi]], [[Lolo Purs]] in ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'', and [[Valik]] in ''[[Star Wars Resistance]]''. She would later voiced [[Viper (droid)|Viper]] in ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Rebuild the Galaxy - Pieces of the Past]]''. Outside of her ''Star Wars'' work, Hale is known for her roles as [[w:c:metroid:Samus Aran|Samus Aran]] in the [[Wikipedia:Metroid Prime: Trilogy|''Metroid Prime'' trilogy]], [[:w:c:powerpuffgirls:Ms. Keane (1998 TV series)|Ms. Keane]] in [[Wikipedia:The Powerpuff Girls|''The Powerpuff Girls'']], [[w:c:metalgear:Naomi Hunter|Naomi Hunter]] and [[w:c:metalgear:Emma Emmerich|Emma Emmerich]] in the [[Wikipedia:Metal Gear|''Metal Gear'' franchise]], and the female voice of [[:w:c:masseffect:Commander Shepard|Commander Shepard]] in the [[Wikipedia:Mass Effect|''Mass Effect'' franchise]].
